title: Accreditation of Principal/Employer in Countries Covered by a Special
content: 34 Agreement. The accreditation of a principal/employer in countries covered by any special 35 agreement entered into by the Philippine government shall be in accordance with the 36 guidelines prescribed by the Department. 37 38
